posts.title: Guide to the Turquoise Connector (MCP)
posts.description: Connect your preferred AI tool directly to the data sources that power AskTQ. Once connected, your AI tool can securely access Turquoise data, starting with Clear Rates.

posts.title: Introducing the Turquoise Out-of-Network Dashboard
posts.description: Turquoise launched a free, open license out-of-network pricer built on data designed to eliminate the opacity in QPA calculations, IDR disputes, and broader OON pricing scenarios.

posts.title: To Patients, AI-Generated Perception is the New Price for Your Drug
posts.description: Here's how you can control the cost narrative vacuum yourself.

posts.title: New York Proves You Can Put a Price on Healthcare
posts.description: Why price transparency has fallen short for patients and how New York City and Turquoise are charting a better path with the new NYC Health Care Price Comparison Tool.

posts.title: Updates to the Hospital MRF Go Live Today — Here's v3
posts.description: Early data shows 2,731 hospitals on v3, 1,956 with median allowed amount data on day one.

posts.title: Designing the Future of Healthcare Payments: Evolving the Turquoise Brand
posts.description: Turquoise Health rebrands to reflect its evolution from a price transparency data company to a full healthcare payments intelligence platform.

posts.title: We Raised a $40M Series C — Here's Exactly What We're Building Next
posts.description: Like always, let's be transparent about what the fundraise means.

posts.description: Transparency in Coverage files are on the verge of a much-needed overhaul to become leaner, more organized, and more useful.

posts.title: Can Price Transparency Lower Cancer Costs?
posts.description: Why complete and extensive disclosures matter if we want to see real change.

posts.title: Turquoise Reflections on the Great Healthcare Plan
posts.description: Momentum builds as the government increases accountability on understanding the cost of care.
